text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines vector search with large language models to generate factually grounded answers.
Vector databases store high-dimensional embeddings and enable fast approximate nearest-neighbor (ANN) similarity search.
Endee is a high-performance open-source vector database supporting HNSW indexing, cosine/L2/IP distance metrics, and payload filtering.
Sentence Transformers convert text into dense vector embeddings using pre-trained transformer models like all-MiniLM-L6-v2.
Semantic search understands the meaning and context of a query, not just exact keyword matches.
FastAPI is a modern, high-performance web framework for building APIs with Python using type hints.
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence where systems learn from data to make predictions or decisions.
HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) is a graph-based algorithm for efficient approximate nearest-neighbor search in high dimensions.
Foxnuts are a nutritious snack rich in protein, antioxidants, calcium, and magnesium. They are low in fat and support heart health.
Hybrid search combines dense vector retrieval with sparse keyword search (like BM25) to maximize search relevance.
